Stablecoin infrastructure
for the
new economy
All-in-one platform for companies and agents to integrate stablecoin rails — including wallets, onramps, stablecoin orchestration & more.
Let's Chat
Start Building
Trusted by 40,000+ enterprises and developers
A fully integrated
suite
of products
Wallet Infrastructure
Create programmable wallets for users, agents, or backend operations.
Wallets
Onramps and payments
Headless APIs and widgets to convert fiat to stablecoins, and sell digital assets.
On and Offramps
Checkout

Mint tokens and verifiable credentials with APIs and no-code tools.
Tokenization Tools

Create wallets for your users or AI agents
Treasury Wallets
Manage and automate your company’s treasury

Manage and send stablecoins globally with instant settlement

Embed plug-and-play stablecoin ramps anywhere
Offramp
Convert stablecoins into local currency

Allow users to buy digital assets with fiat
Agentic Cards
Issue virtual cards for AI agents
Contact us
Need a custom solution?
Let’s chat.
To build
stablecoin
and
agentic payment
solutions
Remittances
Enable faster and cheaper global transfers, plus wallets for recipients.
Agentic Payments
Give financial skills to your agents with a secure payments toolkit
Payroll
Send instant, global payouts to workers and contractors.
Neobanks
Build a global neobank with wallets, payments, yield, and more.
Stablecoins payouts
Pay users or businesses globally with stablecoins.
Treasury management
Run global treasury operations 24/7 with stablecoin efficiency.
Fintechs
Add stablecoins into any product or money flow
Embed wallets and financial services
anywhere: deposits, yield, payments, cards, trading, and more.
Move money globally
faster and at a fraction of the cost with stablecoins — ideal for remittances and cross-border payments.
Agentic Finance
Turn agents into economic actors
Fund agents
and allow them to hold assets and transact securely.
Buy billions of items
via API using cards or stablecoins.
250+ plug-ins
: data feeds, trading, and more.
Licensed infrastructure to launch compliantly
All
US
Coverage for all United States including New York.
All
EU
Support for all 27 countries through MiCA.
160+
countries
Support for either direct onboarding or payouts.
Blockchain in the
backend.
None of the friction
Make the blockchain
invisible
No gas fees, approval prompts, or other blockchain gimmicks.
Go to market
faster
Integrate in minutes and be ready to scale to millions of users.
Gasless
. For you and your users
Crossmint pays for blockchains fees and bills you in fiat.
Unified
dashboards
All data in one place: wallets, payments, tokens.
Built for
enterprise
SOC2 Type II, GDPR. Four 9 SLAs.
Case studies
Powering the leading
companies building with
stablecoins
Learn how Moneygram launched stablecoin powered remittances in 60 days
MoneyGram uses Crossmint’s wallet and stablecoin orchestration infrastructure to power their MoneyGram app and move money faster at a fraction of the cost.
Explore
See how WireX is building a stablecoin neobank for businesses
WireX uses Crossmint's wallet infrastructure to provision next-gen treasury wallets for companies and retail customers.
Explore
How the Marshall Islands Launched the First Blockchain-Based UBI program with Crossmint
Crossmint wallet infrastructure powers the RMI’s first digital UBI program, letting citizens receive, store, and transfer U.S. dollar–denominated funds from their phones.
Explore
How fomo Became Crypto's Fastest-Growing Trading App With Crossmint Token Checkout
Fomo integrated Crossmint's fiat-to-crypto infrastructure to let anyone fund their account and buy tokens with Apple Pay—no KYC, no wallets, no friction.
Explore
See how Kasi Money is building a neobank for freelancers
Kasi Money uses Crossmint's wallet infrastructure to provision stablecoin accounts and low-cost remittances to users.
Explore
Learn how Ruvo (YC'S25) is helping Brazilians access dollars and move money globally
Ruvo helps Brazilians receive USD or crypto and instantly convert to Reais.
Explore
Access 25+ Case Studies
Backed by the best
Get started in
5 minutes.
Scale without limits
Let's Chat
Read the Docs

Learn about new products and features

Frequently asked questions
Are there discounts for purchasing multiple products?
Yes. We offer custom bundle packages with discounted unit rates if you use multiple products.
What is a Monthly Active Wallet?
A wallet is active in a given month if it is included in an API request - including creation, fetching the address, fetching contents, signing a message, transaction, or transfer.
What are user fees on the payments products?
Fees for the checkout and onramp are generally paid for by users as a convenience fee - though you could subsidize them if you wish.
‍
Rates depend on the subscription plan and volume commitment, and are calculated on a per transaction basis depending on the card, geography, currency, blockchain, and multiple other factors. Contact us if you wish you discuss the right plan for you.
What if the features I need are not listed?
Reach out! We are constantly upgrading the platform and there's a chance what you need is live but unpublished. Otherwise, we may be able to prioritize it on the roadmap.
Get started in 10 minutes.
For free
.
All the power of Web3 with none of the hassle.
Start Building
Contact sales
Don’t miss an update

analysis.name: Crossmint
analysis.tagline: Stablecoin infrastructure for the new economy
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one API platform for companies and AI agents to integrate stablecoin wallets, payments, and tokenization with compliance built in.
analysis.ideal_customer: Fintechs, neobanks, remittance companies, payroll platforms, and AI agent developers building global stablecoin-powered financial products

features.name: embedded wallets
features.description: Whitelabel programmable wallets embeddable in web or mobile apps for users or AI agents
features.evidence_quote: Create wallets for your users or AI agents

features.name: treasury wallets
features.description: Company-facing wallets for managing and automating crypto treasury operations
features.evidence_quote: Manage and automate your company's treasury

features.name: stablecoin orchestration
features.description: Manage and send stablecoins globally with instant settlement across 50+ blockchains

features.name: onramps
features.description: Fiat-to-stablecoin conversion widgets and headless APIs for user wallet funding

features.name: offramps
features.description: Convert stablecoins into local currency with payouts to 160+ countries

features.name: token checkout
features.description: Allow users to buy NFTs and fungible tokens with fiat payment methods via hosted or embedded widget
features.evidence_quote: Allow fiat purchases of digital assets

features.name: agentic checkout
features.description: API-first checkout for AI agents to purchase digital and physical items programmatically
features.evidence_quote: Allow agents to buy anything via API

features.name: agentic cards
features.description: Issue virtual cards for AI agents with scoped spending rules and permissions
features.evidence_quote: Save once, give agents scoped card permissions with spending rules

features.name: agent stablecoin wallets
features.description: Non-custodial wallets purpose-built for AI agent-controlled spending
features.evidence_quote: Non-custodial wallets built for agent-controlled spending

features.name: tokenization tools
features.description: Mint, edit, and burn tokens and verifiable credentials at scale via API and no-code tools
features.evidence_quote: Mint tokens and verifiable credentials with APIs and no-code tools.

features.name: policy engine
features.description: Rule-based transaction policies for wallet access control and spending limits

features.name: aml screening
features.description: Advanced anti-money laundering screening via Elliptic integration

features.name: travel rule compliance
features.description: FATF travel rule enforcement via NotaBene integration

features.name: transaction monitoring
features.description: Ongoing monitoring of wallet transactions for compliance and risk management

features.name: transaction simulation
features.description: Pre-flight transaction simulation via Blockaid to detect malicious or failing transactions

features.name: gas sponsorship
features.description: Crossmint pays blockchain gas fees on behalf of users; developer billed in fiat

features.name: delegated signers
features.description: Allow secondary signers to authorize transactions on behalf of wallet owners

features.name: wallet pre-generation
features.description: Pre-create wallets in bulk before user onboarding for faster activation

features.name: mobile sdks
features.description: Native mobile SDKs for embedding wallet functionality in iOS and Android apps

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Event-driven webhook notifications for wallet activity and payment events

features.name: indexing and data apis
features.description: APIs to query wallet balances, transaction history, and on-chain state

features.name: bring your own auth
features.description: Connect existing user authentication to wallet creation without Crossmint login

features.name: analytics dashboard
features.description: Unified dashboard for wallets, payments, and token data with basic and advanced tiers

features.name: advanced account recovery
features.description: Call center-assisted account recovery for users who lose wallet access

features.name: account compression (solana)
features.description: Compressed NFT and account support on Solana for reduced on-chain storage costs

features.name: connect to third-party sites
features.description: Allow embedded wallets to connect to external dApps and DeFi protocols

features.name: sign in with wallet
features.description: Wallet-based authentication via signed messages for user login flows

features.name: white-label onramps
features.description: Fully branded onramp and offramp experience with no Crossmint branding

features.name: native whitelabel integrations
features.description: Native white-label integrations for advanced payment partner branding

features.name: chargeback protection
features.description: Protection against credit card chargebacks on checkout and onramp transactions

features.name: kyc data import via api
features.description: Import existing KYC verification data via API to skip redundant identity checks

features.name: custom email receipts
features.description: Branded transaction email receipts sent to users after checkout and payment events

features.name: custom mcc codes
features.description: Custom Merchant Category Codes for card processing configuration on onramps

features.name: headless api implementation
features.description: Fully headless API mode for custom UI implementations of checkout, onramps, and offramps

features.name: bank transfers
features.description: ACH and bank transfer as a funding method for onramps

features.name: fiat payment methods
features.description: Accept debit/credit cards, ACH, Apple Pay, and Google Pay for crypto purchases
features.evidence_quote: Debit and credit cards / Crypto / ACH / Apple and Google Pay

features.name: currency and language localization
features.description: Multi-currency and multi-language checkout UI for global audiences

features.name: custom erc20/spl token checkout
features.description: Accept custom fungible tokens as payment in addition to native chain assets

features.name: secondary sales
features.description: Enable NFT and token resale through the checkout widget

features.name: contract registration
features.description: Register existing smart contracts with Crossmint to enable checkout for any token

features.name: nft checkout support
features.description: Buy, sell, and distribute NFTs via fiat checkout

features.name: physical products checkout
features.description: Sell physical goods via the token checkout flow

features.name: batch minting
features.description: Mint tokens to many recipients in a single API call for airdrops and mass distributions

features.name: private tokens
features.description: Issue tokens that are not publicly visible on-chain

features.name: non-transferable tokens
features.description: Mint soulbound/non-transferable tokens for credentials and identity attestations

features.name: anti-spam whitelisting
features.description: Control which addresses can receive tokens to prevent spam airdrop attacks

features.name: bring your own smart contract
features.description: Deploy tokenization using a custom smart contract instead of Crossmint defaults

features.name: verifiable credentials
features.description: Issue W3C-standard verifiable credentials as tokens for identity and attestations

features.name: airdrops to emails and social accounts
features.description: Send tokens to users by email or social handle without requiring a wallet address
features.evidence_quote: Airdrops to emails and social accounts

features.name: queueing transactions
features.description: Queue high-volume token transactions to manage throughput and prevent dropped txns

features.name: reliability engine
features.description: Advanced transaction retry and reliability infrastructure for high-volume minting

features.name: metadata management
features.description: Store and manage token metadata with tiered storage limits (10MB free, unlimited paid)
features.evidence_quote: Metadata management 10mb per token / $0.002 per upload / Unlimited

features.name: dedicated treasury management
features.description: Enterprise-grade dedicated treasury wallet management service

features.name: multi-chain support
features.description: Operate across 50+ blockchains from a single unified API

features.name: global payouts
features.description: Send stablecoin payouts to recipients in 170+ countries via licensed infrastructure

features.name: soc2 type ii compliance
features.description: SOC 2 Type II certified security posture for enterprise customers
features.evidence_quote: SOC2 Type II, GDPR. Four 9 SLAs.

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: GDPR-compliant data handling for EU users
features.evidence_quote: SOC2 Type II, GDPR. Four 9 SLAs.

features.name: mica authorization
features.description: EU MiCA regulatory authorization covering all 27 EU member states

features.name: four nines sla
features.description: 99.99% uptime SLA guarantee

features.name: 24/7 support
features.description: Round-the-clock dedicated support with dedicated communication channels for enterprise
features.evidence_quote: 24/7 support Dedicated team and communication channels

features.name: premium sla and rate limits
features.description: Elevated SLAs and higher API rate limits for enterprise tier

features.name: roadmap prioritization
features.description: Enterprise customers can prioritize features on Crossmint's product roadmap
features.evidence_quote: Roadmap prioritization and custom chain integrations

features.name: custom chain integrations
features.description: Enterprise option to add support for additional or private blockchain networks
features.evidence_quote: Roadmap prioritization and custom chain integrations

features.name: crossmint network access
features.description: Access to Crossmint's partner and distribution network for enterprise customers

features.name: n8n integration
features.description: Pre-built n8n workflow nodes to automate payments, money movement, and purchasing
features.evidence_quote: Workflows to automate payments, money movement, and purchasing

features.name: cli tool
features.description: Command-line interface for setting up and managing Crossmint projects
features.evidence_quote: Set up your Crossmint projects directly from the command line

features.name: ai assistant docs integration
features.description: Ingest Crossmint docs into AI coding tools (Cursor, Copilot, etc.) for faster integration
features.evidence_quote: Integrate Crossmint faster by ingesting docs into your favorite AI coding tool.

features.name: sample apps
features.description: Ready-to-run sample apps including a fintech starter with wallets, onramps, and more
features.evidence_quote: Create your own fintech app in minutes with wallets, onramps, and more

features.name: signature-based pricing
features.description: Alternative pricing model for wallets based on transaction signatures rather than MAW

differentiators: MiCA authorized — regulatory coverage across all 27 EU countries
Licensed in all US states including New York
Gasless transactions — Crossmint pays gas fees and bills developer in fiat
160+ country coverage for onramps/offramps with single API
SOC2 Type II + GDPR + 99.99% SLA enterprise compliance stack
AI agent-native financial infrastructure (agent cards, agent wallets, agentic checkout)
All-in-one platform consolidating wallets, payments, tokenization, and compliance
Blockchain invisible to end users — no gas prompts or wallet friction

recent_ships.what: MiCA regulatory authorization obtained covering all 27 EU countries
recent_ships.source: Crossmint is now MiCA authorized → (site banner, landing page)

free_tier.limits: 1,000 MAW; up to 2,000 transactions; $50 gas sponsorship; tokenization at $0.01/action up to 100/hour

tiers.name: Developer (Wallets)
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1,000 free MAW; $0.05/MAW overage; basic analytics; $50 gas sponsorship; core wallet features

tiers.name: Custom (Wallets)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Volume MAW discounts; policy engine; advanced AML via Elliptic; travel rule via NotaBene; signature-based pricing

tiers.name: Custom (On/Offramps)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Tiered per-transaction fees; full white-label; 160+ countries incl. NY; chargeback protection; KYC import

tiers.name: Custom (Stablecoin Orchestration)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Per-transaction tiered fees; licensed infra; 50+ blockchains; payouts to 170+ countries; AML + travel rule

tiers.name: Developer (Checkout)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Cards, crypto, ACH, Apple/Google Pay; standard analytics; hosted and embedded; no chargeback protection

tiers.name: Custom (Checkout)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced analytics; custom chargeback protection; custom email receipts; secondary sales; advanced features

tiers.name: Developer (Tokenization)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Starts at $0.01/action; 100 actions/hour; 10MB metadata/token at $0.002/upload; basic reliability engine

tiers.name: Scale (Tokenization)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 2.5M actions/hour; unlimited metadata; batch minting; airdrops; advanced reliability; volume discounts

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: 24/7 support; premium SLAs and rate limits; dedicated team; roadmap prioritization; custom chain integrations

pricing.notes: Per-product pricing model — wallets charged per Monthly Active Wallet ($0.05 overage), payments/orchestration charged per transaction with tiered volume discounts. Tokenization charged per action ($0.01 base); metadata storage $0.002/upload on free tier. Bundle discounts available for multi-product use. Fees on checkout/onramp are typically charged to end users as a convenience fee but can be subsidized by developer.

recent_hn.title: Show HN: DialtoneApp Network, card payments for bot commerce
